subtitle: What I'm focused on right now.

sections.heading: Research
sections.body: Working as a graduate student at CU Boulder investigating quantum photonics, neuromorphic computing, and photonic integrated circuits.

sections.heading: Podcast
sections.body: Working on a science podcast about how fundamental physics becomes real instruments and technology. Still early — putting together the guest list and the first few episodes.

sections.heading: Ventures
sections.body: Thinking about deep-tech companies in photonics, quantum sensing, and AI. Nothing to announce yet.

sections.heading: Learning
sections.body: Quantum computing, machine and deep learning fundamentals, Lean 4, fiber optics, and the business mechanics of deep-tech company formation.
